pageDescription: Calculate investment returns and growth projections with regular contributions, dividends, and varying rates of return for retirement and financial planning

diversification.title: Diversification
diversification.description: Spreading investments across different assets reduces risk

dollarCostAveraging.title: Dollar-Cost Averaging
dollarCostAveraging.description: Investing fixed amounts regularly reduces impact of market volatility

compoundGrowth.title: Compound Growth
compoundGrowth.description: Reinvesting earnings accelerates investment growth over time

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides investment growth estimates only
criticalWarningsList.market: Actual investment returns may vary significantly based on market conditions

importantNotesList: Past performance does not guarantee future results
All investments carry some level of risk
Consider your risk tolerance when setting return expectations
Regular portfolio rebalancing helps maintain target allocation

messages.enterInformation: Enter your investment information to calculate growth projections
messages.resultMessage: Your investment calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides investment growth estimates based on mathematical projections. Actual investment returns may vary significantly based on market conditions, fees, taxes, and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Financial Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized investment advice and portfolio management, consult financial advisors or investment professionals with expertise in asset allocation and individual financial circumstances.
